节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Enumerates the layout direction of the icon and text.
Horizontal layout.
Vertical layout.
Defines the method of a security component.
Icon size.
注释信息: @param { Dimension } value - Indicates the size of the icon.
@returns { T } Returns the attribute of the security component.

parameters.说明: Indicates the size of the icon.

节点.return_description: Returns the attribute of the security component.

节点.功能描述: Layout direction of the icon and text.
注释信息: @param { SecurityComponentLayoutDirection } value - Indicates the layout direction of the icon and text.
@returns { T } Returns the attribute of the security component.

parameters.说明: Indicates the layout direction of the icon and text.

节点.return_description: Returns the attribute of the security component.

节点.功能描述: Position of the security component.
注释信息: @param { Position } value - Indicates the position of the security component.
@returns { T } Returns the attribute of the security component.

parameters.说明: Indicates the position of the security component.

节点.return_description: Returns the attribute of the security component.

节点.功能描述: Anchor of the security component for positioning. The top start edge of the component is used as the reference point for offset.
注释信息: @param { Position } value - Indicates the anchor of the component when it is positioned.
@returns { T } Returns the attribute of the security component.

parameters.说明: Indicates the anchor of the component when it is positioned.

节点.return_description: Returns the attribute of the security component.

节点.功能描述: Coordinate offset relative to the layout completion position. Setting this attribute does not affect the layout of the parent container. The position is adjusted only during drawing.
Font size of the inner text.
注释信息: @param { Dimension } value - Indicates the font size of the text in the security component.
@returns { T } Returns the attribute of the security component.

parameters.说明: Indicates the font size of the text in the security component.

节点.return_description: Returns the attribute of the security component.
